results.description: A species of cat with horns or antlers.

results.description: The Khan of the revived Abzan Houses.

results.name: ferocious
results.description: Cards that care about you controlling creatures with power 4 or greater.

results.name: fetchland
results.description: Lands that sacrifice to tutor for other lands

results.name: ff chocobo spinoffs
results.description: Art from the various final fantasy spinoffs focused around a Chocobo.

results.name: ffxiv adventurer
results.description: Also known as "Warriors of Light". Story characters and "generic" characters that are meant to represent the players of Final Fantasy XIV.

results.name: ffxiv player character
results.description: Artwork depicting characters who are confirmed to be based on player characters from Final Fantasy XIV Online

results.name: fiction reference
results.description: Art that contains an homage to other works of fiction. See also [real-life reference](real-life-reference).

results.name: field note
results.description: A format where the object is protrayed as if it's in a guide of some sorts

results.name: filigree
results.description: Also known as metal lace. An form of metalwork typically associated with the plane Avishkar.

results.name: filigree sylex
results.description: A recreation of the Golgothian Sylex, made by Saheeli during the Phyrexian invasion of the multiverse

results.name: filterland
results.description: Lands that take one mana and give you back another colour of mana, sometimes in greater quantities.

results.name: final fantasy
results.description: The many worlds of FINAL FANTASY, an influential JRPG series.

results.name: final fantasy job
results.description: Art depicting a specific Final Fantasy Job ("Class").

results.name: final fantasy summon
results.description: Art that depicts the various iterations of summons in the FINAL FANTASY series.

results.name: fin beard
results.description: Fins or other fleshy projections from an aquatic humanoid's chin that strongly resemble a human beard

results.name: fin hair
results.description: Fins on an aquatic humanoid's head that strongly resemble human hairstyles.

results.name: fireball outrun
results.description: The character outruns an explosion in the background, often in a very badass way

results.name: firebending
results.description: An elemental bending tradition common in the Fire Nation. Some advanced firebenders can even create lightning. For other generic forms of fire magic, see [pyromancy](pyromancy).

results.name: firebend-like
results.description: When a creature attacks, get mana of some kind
